name: Compania Industrial El Volcan S.A.
summary: Compa√É¬±√É¬≠a Industrial El Volc√É¬°n S.A. produces and sells construction materials in Chile and internationally. The company offers inner liners, manhole covers, traditional and acoustic volcanoes, panels and laminates, perimeter walls, fa√É¬ßade finishing products, plates for wet areas, impact plates, and plates with built-in color, as well as plasters, powders, and putties; and volcanites for wet areas, fire, hanging heavy elements, high hardness/impacts, radiological protection, and thermal insulation. It also provides commercial and industrial building insulation products, such as insulation for boilers and ponds, pipes, and industrial sheds, as well as thermal insulation products; ducts for air conditioning, heating, and ventilation; residential thermal insulation products; and flooring solutions, as well as volcanites with straight and curved shapes, and decoration. In addition, the company offers volcan products for agricultural use; and volcan accessories. The company was founded in 1916 and is based in Santiago, Chile.
